description_long: This muffin features a tall, cylindrical base with a slightly irregular, textured brown surface resembling baked dough. The top is generously coated with a thick layer of white frosting, which appears uneven and natural, as if applied by hand. Embedded in the frosting are a variety of colorful sprinkles, including pink, green, and yellow rods, metallic gold and silver balls, and green star-shaped confetti, creating a festive appearance. The muffin lacks a visible wrapper, exposing the baked surface all around. The overall form is plump and inviting, with the frosting slightly overflowing the top edge. The object is presented against a plain, white background with no visible support or setting.
description: A tall, brown muffin with thick white frosting and colorful sprinkles, lacking a visible wrapper. The frosting is generously applied and decorated with various festive toppings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's tall, cylindrical shape with white frosting and a dense cluster of colorful sprinkles on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the rounded frosting dome and the way it slightly overhangs the muffin's edge, with sprinkles distributed unevenly.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the muffin's textured brown surface and the thick, glossy frosting with visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the irregular edge of the frosting and the spread of sprinkles, with the muffin base appearing slightly more tapered.
attribute_frosting_style: thick, hand-applied white sugar icing with an uneven, natural finish
